name: Incident
text: Loud alarms echo through the complex as engineers report abnormal radiation readings. Although no catastrophic breach has occurred because of automatic safety system, the news has already unsettled the nearby populations. The public demand answers. Industry leaders demands continuity. Camera strobe flashes. You have to choose.

choices.text: No need to worry, everything is under control.
We will shut down the reactors for maintenance and repair.
uniques: [-5 Production] <in cities with a [Nuclear Plant]> <for [5] turns>

choices.text: To prevent future meltdown, we will install new and improved modules to power plants.
uniques: Gain a free [Improved Reactors and Safety Systems] [in all cities]
Unavailable <if [Improved Reactors and Safety Systems] is constructed>

name: Meltdown
text: A comet was sighted in the sky. Some people in the past believed that this portents fell times ahead. Others used to believe that they are in fact pixie fairies floating in the sky. Such primitive ways of thinking, it's almost embarassing that our ancestors used to believe in such nonsensical rubbish like that.

choices.text: Thank God we live in such enlightened times.
